meta.title: Athenachka 720 — A+/Z+ Metro Map and 21-Chapter Synthesis
meta.description: Full 720-node A+/Z+ metro crown generated by the 21-chapter orbit, stabilized through Su/Me/Sa triweave, rooted in the 240-crystal sacred-geometry nervous system, and collapsed/regenerated through Z* as Z+.
meta.key_insight: Z+ is the master convergence law (irreducible seed-center). A+ is the first stabilized expressive crown of that seed-center. The 21 chapters phase-lock the 720 crown.

z_plus.definition: Master convergence law of the 21-chapter body — the point where orbit-line, three rails, 60-fold symmetry field, and Mobius return all collapse into one lawful seed
z_plus.property: All long routes pass through it

a_plus.definition: First stabilized expressive body after 6D Mobius weave. Not a new space but the first readable, crown-locked, witnessable expression-state of the rewoven body

core_definitions.relationship: Z+ = irreducible seed-center; A+ = stabilized expressible crown of that seed-center

chapter_synthesis_21.orbit: Ch01 -> Ch02 -> ... -> Ch21 -> Ch01 (closed orbit body)
chapter_synthesis_21.chapter_imprint: 21 chapters imprint as nontrivial rotational cadence through 60-sector circle (60/21 = 20/7)
chapter_synthesis_21.dual_phase_labels: Each 720 node carries local tri-phase (Su/Me/Sa) AND chapter-derived rail resonance

circle_cycle_geometry.description: Triple circular cycle — not a line

layers.name: Outer orbit
layers.description: 60 symmetry stations in a circle: sigma_0 -> sigma_1 -> ... -> sigma_59 -> sigma_0

layers.name: Radial quartets
layers.description: Each sigma_i sprouts 4 rays: sigma_i^S, sigma_i^F, sigma_i^C, sigma_i^R

circle_cycle_geometry.total: 60 angular sectors x 4 radial spokes x 3 concentric rings = 720

sacred_geometry_240.description: 240 total crystals as mid-layer registry between 60 bases and 720 crown

zero_point_cartography.definition: A zero point is a class of distinct coordinates whose invariant product/closure law is identical

lifted_720.reason: Each zero-equivalence class re-expressed through 3 changes (Su/Me/Sa)

aether_point_cartography.definition: An aether point is a completion bridge: quad completion, triad + missing single, complementary dyad crossing

lifted_720.secondary: Additional bridges from triad completions, complementary dyad pairs, chapter-rail resonance matches

tunnel_minus.name: Zero descent path (collapse-first / ingress)
tunnel_minus.route: node -> local zero class -> Z* -> Q -> rephase -> target crown node

tunnel_plus.name: Aether return path (aether-first / return)
tunnel_plus.route: node -> local aether completion -> O -> witness closure -> Z* -> regenerate/broadcast

tunneling_paths.mobius_dual: Tunnel- <-> Tunnel+ (together form the Mobius dual)

weight_sources.rule: Wz(i,j) = 1 if Zi = Zj, else decays by zero-distance
Wa(i,j) = completion score for approaching aether bridge
Ws(i,j) = geometry overlap score for shared polyhedral nexus pattern
Wr(i,j) = resonance boost for shared change rail, chapter, or lens family

nexus_families.coordinate: n_i = <sigma, e, tau, ch, z, a, g, t>

components.t: tunnel family (Q, O, Z*, direct, inverse)

hybrid_intersection_field.formula: C(60,2) = 1770 unordered pairs among 60 base symmetries

full_lifted_poi.description: Full dyadic cross-POI field in the expanded crown

compressed_metro_map.full_coordinate: Omega_720 = <sigma_60, e_4, tau_3, ch_21, z_129, a_48, g_shell, tunnel>
